TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Spwan, title = Spwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spwan} }

S.FORM: Spwan Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Spwan a niyaro', 18 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 57 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 100% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 57 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 0% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal95%, Amis2%, roma3%.
S.PHON: spwan itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u spwan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. ***% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Spwan Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Spwan a niyaro', 18 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 57 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 100% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 57 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 0% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal95%, Amis2%, roma3%.
S.PHON: spwan itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u spwan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. ***% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%.
